params.label: Populations
params.tip: Populations to model, across any segmentation (e.g. A/_tracked, B/_tracked, C/_tracked). One HMM is fitted jointly over all selected populations and all selected images. Pick a segmentation's tracked cells (/_tracked) or a gated population within it.

params.label: Name
params.tip: Suffix for the output column: live.cell.hmm.state.<name>.

params.label: Properties
params.tip: Per-cell measures to model (Gaussian emissions, one per measurement). Tracking measures (live.cell.*) and object measures (intensities by channel, shape) are listed separately.

params.label: Number of states
params.tip: Number of discrete behavioural (hidden) states to fit.

params.label: Noise filter window
params.tip: Per-track running-mean window applied to measurements before fitting (0 = off).

params.label: Post-filter window
params.tip: Smooth decoded states with a per-track windowed mode (0 = off).

params.label: Normalise
params.tip: Measurements to divide by a global summary statistic.

params.label: Normalise to
params.tip: Statistic the normalised measurements are divided by.

params.label: Scale (÷ sd)
params.tip: Measurements to divide by their standard deviation (no centring), as in R scale(center=FALSE).
